title: Présentation du club
summary: Sonbae is organised around high-trust teaching, transparent operations, and shared responsibility for student progress.

blocks.heading: Mission
blocks.body: The club supports teachers with practical information, clear decision paths, and reliable operational routines. The intranet is the single entry point for staff who need to understand how the organisation works.
bullets: Fast access to owners and documents

blocks.heading: Teaching culture
blocks.body: L’équipe applique des standards communs tout en conservant son jugement professionnel. Les responsables de département coordonnent la cohérence de la planification, de l’évaluation et de la communication aux familles.

resources.title: Parcours d’accueil équipe
resources.description: A concise guide to teams, tools, routines, and first-month expectations.

resources.title: Teacher handbook
resources.description: Reference handbook for classroom routines, communication norms, and professional standards.

title: Structure
summary: The organisation is grouped into learning, student support, and operations, with clear handoffs between department leads and service owners.

blocks.heading: Operating lines
blocks.body: Learning teams own curriculum delivery, student support owns safeguarding and wellbeing coordination, and operations owns the systems that keep the school day running.
bullets: Opérations: calendars, rooms, substitutions, staff services

blocks.heading: Escalation
blocks.body: Teachers start with their department lead for instructional questions and use functional relays for cross-team blockers.

resources.title: Organisation chart
resources.description: Current leadership and reporting structure.

title: Rôles et déploiement
summary: Le déploiement des rôles aligne expertise, horaires, besoins des élèves et priorités des départements.

blocks.heading: Deployment principles
blocks.body: Deployment decisions balance continuity for students with development opportunities for teachers. Changes are discussed with department leads before timetable publication.
bullets: Match specialist expertise to course needs
Publish changes with a clear rationale

resources.title: Guide des familles de rôles
resources.description: Vue d’ensemble des responsabilités enseignant, responsable, coordinateur et administrateur.

resources.title: Timetable deployment checklist
resources.description: Checks completed before role deployment is confirmed.

title: Charters & Labels
summary: Les chartes définissent les engagements liés à la qualité pédagogique, l’inclusion, la sécurité et la collaboration.

blocks.heading: Quality labels
blocks.body: Labels help staff identify approved, reviewed, and draft resources. Published materials must have an owner, review date, and clear scope.
bullets: Under review: active update in progress

resources.title: Charte de qualité pédagogique
resources.description: Shared commitments for planning, instruction, assessment, and feedback.

resources.title: Charte d’inclusion
resources.description: Expectations for differentiation, access plans, and student support handoffs.

resources.title: Label sécurité numérique
resources.description: Approval requirements for classroom software and digital student data use.

title: Governance & Responsibilities
summary: Governance clarifies who decides, who advises, who executes, and who must be informed.

blocks.heading: Decision model
blocks.body: La plupart des décisions sont prises au niveau responsable le plus proche. Les responsables traitent les sujets pédagogiques courants, la direction arbitre les sujets transversaux et valide les changements institutionnels.
bullets: Student risk: wellbeing coordinator and director

blocks.heading: Responsibilities
blocks.body: Chaque processus majeur dispose d’un responsable, d’un relais et d’un chemin d’escalade. Les responsables maintiennent la documentation et le rythme de revue.

resources.title: RACI matrix
resources.description: Decision rights for curriculum, student support, operations, events, and communications.

title: Institutional & Legal Docs
summary: Reference point for legal, institutional, and compliance documents used by staff and leadership.

blocks.heading: Document handling
blocks.body: Les documents institutionnels ne doivent pas être dupliqués localement. L’équipe doit utiliser la source approuvée et demander les mises à jour via les opérations.

resources.title: Code de conduite de l’équipe
resources.description: Professional conduct, boundaries, confidentiality, and reporting obligations.

resources.title: Data protection notice
resources.description: Rules for handling student records, assessment data, and family communications.

resources.title: Safeguarding policy
resources.description: Mandatory procedures for recording and escalating student safety concerns.

title: 6.1 Optional Annex
summary: Reserved annex for future governance notes, board extracts, or exceptional operating guidance.

blocks.heading: Annex scope
blocks.body: This area stays separate from core governance so experimental or exceptional guidance can be reviewed before becoming policy.

title: Relais fonctionnels
summary: Les relais fonctionnels sont les personnes et canaux qui fluidifient le travail entre équipes.

blocks.heading: How relays work
blocks.body: Use relays for cross-functional blockers that cannot be solved inside a department meeting or normal ticket flow.
bullets: Use the relay owner for urgent cross-team blockers
Keep department leads copied on instructional impacts
Record decisions in the relevant process page

resources.title: Relay directory
resources.description: Current owners for systems, events, safeguarding, facilities, and communications.

title: Processus et évolutions
summary: Les changements de processus sont suivis de la proposition au test, puis à l’approbation, au déploiement et à la revue.

blocks.heading: Onboarding
blocks.body: New staff follow a staged onboarding path covering identity, systems access, safeguarding basics, department routines, and first-month check-ins.

blocks.heading: Training
blocks.body: Training cycles keep staff aligned on classroom practice, systems, policies, and student support procedures.

blocks.heading: Certification
blocks.body: Certification confirms that staff have completed required training and can operate independently within their responsibilities.

blocks.heading: Deployment
blocks.body: Deployment assigns people, tools, spaces, and responsibilities after readiness checks are complete.

blocks.heading: Evaluation
blocks.body: Evaluation captures what worked, what needs adjustment, and which process owner should act next.

blocks.heading: Evolution
blocks.body: Approved improvements are published into the intranet and monitored through the next operating cycle.

resources.title: Demande de changement de processus
resources.description: Template for describing the issue, proposed change, impact, and review date.

timeline.label: Onboarding
timeline.description: Les nouveaux membres et responsables reçoivent les accès de base, les supports et un contact nommé.

timeline.label: Training
timeline.description: Required training is scheduled, completed, and logged against the staff member or process owner.

timeline.label: Certification
timeline.description: Les responsables valident la préparation avant autonomie ou déploiement élargi.

timeline.label: Deployment
timeline.description: Responsibilities, systems access, rooms, and communications are put into operation.

timeline.label: Evaluation
timeline.description: Les responsables analysent preuves, incidents, retours équipe et indicateurs de service.

timeline.label: Evolution
timeline.description: The improved process is versioned, published, announced, and assigned a new review date.

title: Opérations et systèmes
summary: Core systems and routines for rooms, substitutions, devices, accounts, and daily operations.

blocks.heading: Daily operations
blocks.body: Submit time-sensitive requests through the operations desk. For classroom disruption, contact the daily operations relay before filing a routine ticket.
bullets: Room changes by 14:00 the previous day
Substitution requests as soon as absence is known

resources.title: Guide d’accès systèmes
resources.description: How staff request, recover, and close access to school systems.

resources.title: Room booking rules
resources.description: Shared rules for specialist rooms, event spaces, and ad hoc reservations.

title: Chiffres et KPI
summary: KPI placeholders for attendance, assessment completion, response times, and operational service levels.

blocks.heading: KPI use
blocks.body: The demo tracks placeholder indicators only. A dynamic app can connect these cards to analytics, attendance, assessment, and ticketing data.

resources.title: KPI definitions
resources.description: Common definitions for reporting windows, thresholds, and source systems.

kpis.title: Suivi des présences
kpis.description: Percentage of flagged attendance cases reviewed within two school days.

kpis.title: Complétion des évaluations
kpis.description: Share of common assessments entered before the reporting cutoff.

kpis.title: Réponse opérations
kpis.description: Median response time for staff operations requests.

title: Calculateur
summary: Planning calculator placeholder for staffing, groups, event load, and operational estimates.

blocks.heading: Calculateur scope
blocks.body: This page reserves space for future formulas and API-driven assumptions. For the static demo, it documents the expected input categories.

resources.title: Hypothèses de planification
resources.description: Baseline ratios and assumptions used in staffing and event planning estimates.

title: Actualités
summary: Current announcements for staff, including policy updates, events, and operations reminders.

blocks.heading: This week
blocks.body: Department leads should confirm assessment calendar changes by Friday. Opérations will publish the revised event supervision rota after confirmations are complete.

blocks.heading: Staff reminder
blocks.body: The safeguarding refresher closes on April 24, 2026. Completion is required for all staff with student-facing responsibilities.

resources.title: Weekly staff bulletin
resources.description: Compiled announcements, deadlines, and upcoming internal events.

title: Calendrier
summary: Key staff dates for department meetings, assessment windows, reporting deadlines, and school events.

blocks.heading: Upcoming rhythm
blocks.body: The calendar is arranged around assessment windows, student support review cycles, and staff briefing dates.

resources.title: Term 3 calendar
resources.description: Assessment windows, events, deadlines, and staff professional learning days.

timeline.label: Family conferences
timeline.description: Advisors prepare notes and support requests.

title: Contacts / support
summary: Find the right owner for operational help, student support escalation, systems issues, and governance questions.

blocks.heading: Niveaux de support
blocks.body: Use the fastest direct route for urgent student safety or classroom disruption. Routine requests should go through the named owner or service queue.

resources.title: Formulaire de support
resources.description: Standard route for non-urgent operations, systems, and document requests.
